Surveys of Consumers

The Surveys of Consumers is a rotating panel survey based on a nationally representative sample of U.S. households.

Summary of Recent Monthly Results

Monthly Results: Index of Consumer Sentiment and Components
Month Index of Consumer Sentiment Index of Consumer Expectations Index of Current Economic Conditions
May 2026 (P) 67.4 58.2 81.3
April 2026 52.2 47.3 60.4
March 2026 57.0 52.6 63.8
February 2026 64.7 58.9 74.0
January 2026 71.1 64.5 81.1

Historical Data

For historical monthly data tables going back to 1978, see the main data page.
